text.title: Software Development Best Practices 2026 Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the rubric artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-best-practices-2026.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: missing required repo; status enum violation; items minItems=6 missing.
